patterns.description: Direct KnowledgeVectorStore import after ContextAssembler convergence
patterns.rationale: Sprint 7 converged knowledge on ContextAssembler. Any new KVS import is drift.

patterns.description: Direct call to process_message_v1 after V2 cutover
patterns.rationale: V1 calls require logic review — not mechanical. Opens issue, never auto-repairs.

patterns.description: Legacy [TOOL:...] regex pattern instead of typed tool calls
patterns.rationale: Pre-migration tool call format. Requires typed model replacement — needs human.
Silent fallback. Needs human to verify correct log level and fallback intent.
Causes runtime warnings in full test suite. Mechanical fixture replacement.

patterns.description: Hardcoded agent list instead of registry-derived VALID_AGENTS
patterns.rationale: Sprint 7 fixed this once. If it reappears it means registry drift — needs human.

patterns.description: GitNexus tool call without health check gate
patterns.rationale: GitNexus runtime integration was missing at audit. Any new call needs gate verification.

patterns.description: process_message called with raw dict instead of typed model
patterns.rationale: Typed models exist but are not enforced. Needs human to wire correct model.

patterns.description: Legacy JSON knowledge index rebuild instead of Qdrant seed
patterns.rationale: Orchestrator reindex path was a live seam in Sprint 7. Mechanical redirect to seed path.
